message:
🐛 Fix mouse scroll in tmux sessions via web terminal (#126)

xterm.js emits mouse events (scroll, click) via onBinary, not onData.
Without an onBinary handler, mouse escape sequences never reached the
PTY, so tmux mouse mode (set -g mouse on) had no effect — scrolling
triggered shell history navigation instead of scrollback.

Add term.onBinary handler to forward binary data over the websocket,
enabling tmux mouse scroll, click-to-select-pane, and drag-to-resize.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
